# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: my-vpc-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      name: my-vpc-network

  - name: my-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true

  - name: my-internal-firewall
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      name: internal-allow-icmp
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports: 
            - '22'
            - '80'
            - '443'
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      direction: INGRESS

  - name: my-east-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: us-east1
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true

  - name: my-west-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: us-west1
      network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true
